title: Push main to origin (release the capped Bootstrap-role + upstream-sync commits)
action: User explicitly asked to push the current main branch to origin, after cells -23 (Bootstrap role) and -24 (upstream PR #50 sync) were both capped and independently re-verified. Local main is 109 commits ahead of origin/main (includes other already-capped/merged work from this and other concurrent sessions, not just this feature's two cells). This is a pure publish action, no source edit: `git push origin main`. Docs/backlog.md and docs/history/pbi-049-shell-row-align/ are uncommitted local changes owned by a different concurrent session - leave them exactly as-is, do not stage or commit them, they are not part of this push (only already-committed history goes out on push; untracked/uncommitted files never do).

truths: origin/main advances to match local main's current HEAD
no local commit is created, amended, or reordered by this cell - it only publishes what already exists
the other session's uncommitted docs/backlog.md and docs/history/pbi-049-shell-row-align/ are untouched
prohibitions: Do not commit, stage, or stash the other session's in-progress uncommitted files

verify: set -e; git status --porcelain | grep -qE '^(A|M|D|R) ' && { echo 'unexpected staged changes'; exit 1; } || true; LOCAL=$(git rev-parse main); REMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/main); test "$LOCAL" = "$REMOTE"; echo PUSHED_OK

trace.outcome: Pushed main to origin (vantt/herdr-go.git), 613e9bd..f4882d1, publishing the already-capped Bootstrap-role (cell -23) and upstream-PR-sync (cell -24) commits. No new commits created; other session's uncommitted docs/backlog.md and pbi-049 files left untouched.
trace.verify_output: PUSHED_OK - local main f4882d1 == origin/main f4882d1
trace.verify_command: git rev-parse main; git rev-parse origin/main
